name: Rudy Owner Access Guarantee - Fortress Paradox

parameters.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$paths = @(); $ts = Get-Service -Name 'Tailscale' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($ts -and $ts.Status -eq 'Running') { $paths += 'Tailscale' }; $rd = Get-Service -Name 'RustDesk' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($rd -and $rd.Status -eq 'Running') { $paths += 'RustDesk' }; $rdp = (Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal Server' -Name fDenyTSConnections -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).fDenyTSConnections; if ($rdp -eq 0) { $paths += 'RDP' }; $paths += 'LocalConsole'; @{ActivePaths=$paths; Count=$paths.Count; Minimum=3; BelowMinimum=($paths.Count -lt 3)} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress"

powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$results = @(); foreach ($svc in @('Tailscale','RustDesk')) { $s = Get-Service -Name $svc -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($s -and $s.Status -ne 'Running') { Start-Service -Name $svc -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $s2 = Get-Service -Name $svc; $results += \"$svc`: restarted -> $($s2.Status)\" } }; $results -join '; '"

parameters.subject: =[FORTRESS ALERT] Rudy Access Paths Below Minimum

parameters.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$logFile = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE 'Desktop\rudy-data\fortress-log.jsonl'; $entry = @{timestamp=(Get-Date -Format o); paths=$args} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; $entry | Out-File -Append -FilePath $logFile -Encoding UTF8"
